transcript.speaker: RevPilot CEO
transcript.text: We combine three providers because no single source gives us complete company context.

transcript.speaker: RevPilot CTO
transcript.text: Our agents fail when page formats change and the extracted fields are inconsistent.

transcript.speaker: RevPilot CEO
transcript.text: Research, messaging, and CRM agents each keep separate context.

transcript.speaker: RevPilot COO
transcript.text: Anything customer-facing must be approved by a human.

summary.next_step: Kymble joint Nimble + Kylon architecture workshop
